task: In Simple Calendar Pro, delete all events scheduled for this Thursday.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the Android home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Chrome, Phone, and Messages. The target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not visible on this main home screen page.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day

[Decision]
Based on the observation, I am on the home screen and the Simple Calendar Pro app is not among the shortcuts currently displayed. To proceed with the task of deleting events in that specific app, I need to launch it first. I will execute the system-level action to open the Simple Calendar Pro app directly.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. Today's date is highlighted as the 15th (Sunday). The days of the week are listed at the top (M, T, W, Th, F, S, S). I can see various events scheduled on different days, such as "Review" on the 10th, "Catch up" on the 5th, and multiple events on the 19th, 20th, and 27th.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date → | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day

[Decision]
Based on the plan to navigate to "this Thursday", I need to identify which date corresponds to Thursday in the current context. Today is Sunday, October 15th. Counting forward, Thursday of this week is October 19th. There are two events scheduled for the 19th: "Call with" and "Meeting". To delete them, I first need to open the daily view for that specific day. Therefore, I will tap on the cell for the 19th.

[Memory]
Target day identified as Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete on this day: "Call with" and "Meeting".

[Observation]
The screen displays the daily schedule for Thursday, October 19th. There are two events listed: "Call with Marketing" scheduled from 12:00 to 13:00, and "Meeting with HR" scheduled from 23:00 to 00:00 (October 20).

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
Based on the plan to delete all events for today, I need to handle them one by one. I will start with the first event on the list, "Call with Marketing". To delete it, I first need to open the event details by tapping on the event card.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (in progress) and "Meeting with HR" (pending).

[Observation]
The screen shows the "Edit Event" page for the event titled "Call with Marketing". The event is scheduled for October 19 (Thu) from 12:00 to 13:00. At the top right of the screen, there are several icons: checkmark (save), trash can (delete), copy, and more options (three dots).

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
I am now on the details page for the first event, "Call with Marketing". To fulfill the current plan step of deleting this event, I need to use the delete function provided on this screen. The trash can icon in the top right corner is the standard delete button. I will tap it to remove this event.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (deletion in progress) and "Meeting with HR" (pending).

[Observation]
The screen displays a confirmation dialog box with the message "Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?". The dialog has two options: "No" and "Yes". The background shows the "Edit Event" page for "Call with Marketing", which is currently grayed out.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
I am currently facing a deletion confirmation dialog for the "Call with Marketing" event. To complete the deletion process initiated in the previous step, I need to confirm the action. The "Yes" button will finalize the deletion of this event. I will tap "Yes".

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (confirmation pending) and "Meeting with HR" (pending).

[Observation]
The screen displays the schedule for Thursday, October 19th. The previous event "Call with Marketing" has been successfully removed. There is now only one remaining event scheduled for this day: "Meeting with HR" from 23:00 to 00:00 (October 20).

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
According to the current plan to delete all events for this Thursday, I need to handle the remaining event. I can see the "Meeting with HR" event card on the screen. To delete it, I first need to open its details page by tapping on it. I will tap on the event card.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (deleted), "Meeting with HR" (pending deletion).

[Observation]
The screen displays the "Edit Event" page for the event titled "Meeting with HR". The event is scheduled for October 19 (Thu) from 23:00 to October 20 (Fri) 00:00. At the top right of the screen, there are several icons: a checkmark (save), a trash can (delete), a copy icon, and a three-dot menu icon.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
I am now on the details page for the "Meeting with HR" event, which is the second event scheduled for Thursday that needs to be deleted. To remove it, I need to find the delete option. The trash can icon is visible in the top right corner of the screen. I will tap this icon to initiate the deletion process for this event.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (deleted), "Meeting with HR" (currently deleting).

[Observation]
The screen shows a confirmation dialog box overlaying the "Edit Event" page for "Meeting with HR". The dialog asks, "Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?" with two options: "No" and "Yes".

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day →

[Decision]
I have initiated the deletion of the "Meeting with HR" event, and a confirmation dialog has appeared. To finalize the deletion of this event as per the current plan to delete all events for Thursday, I need to confirm the action. I will tap "Yes" on the dialog box.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events to delete: "Call with Marketing" (deleted), "Meeting with HR" (deletion confirmation pending). Once confirmed, this day should have no events left.

[Observation]
The screen displays the daily schedule view for Thursday, October 19th. The main area of the screen is completely blank, indicating there are no events listed for this day. The header confirms the date as "October 19 (Thu)".

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to this Thursday's date ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events scheduled for that day ✓ | Step 4: Verify deletion and complete task →

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the schedule for Thursday, October 19th is now empty. Both previously identified events ("Call with Marketing" and "Meeting with HR") have been successfully deleted. The goal of deleting all events scheduled for this Thursday has been achieved. Therefore, I will declare the task complete.

[Memory]
Target day: Thursday, October 19th. Events successfully deleted: "Call with Marketing" and "Meeting with HR". The schedule for this day is now empty. Task objective fulfilled.
